name: Tell the Story
focus: Mixed past tense in context - story sequencing
storyIntro: The field trip story got all mixed up! Put it back in order!
storyOutro: The story makes sense again. What a great adventure!

tasks.prompt: First, the class ___ on the bus to go to the museum.
Then, they ___ songs on the bus.
Put the field trip story in the right order.
items: The class got on the bus.
They ate lunch in the cafeteria.
tasks.hint: What happened first? What happened last?

tasks.prompt: The children ___ surprised when they ___ the big dinosaur.
The class visit the museum and see many animals.
tasks.hint: This story is about the past!

tasks.prompt: Miss Wilson ___ the class to follow the rules.
What happened at the Dinosaur Gallery? Put it in order.
items: The children walked into the gallery.
Miss Wilson reminded them to be quiet.
tasks.hint: First they went in, then they saw something.

tasks.prompt: The lizard ___ pink sneakers and the snake ___ black sneakers!
Which sentence tells about the past correctly?
options: The class went to the museum and saw dinosaurs.
The class go to the museum and see dinosaurs.
The class goed to the museum and seed dinosaurs.
The class goes to the museum and sees dinosaurs.
